item.description:
Outside of mathematics, I enjoy playing the piano 🎹. Some of my performances can be found on Youtube. I feel very fortunate to have friends with whom I go to concerts and appreciate classical music together!

I am also passionate about photography 📷, which gives me a new and more attentive way of looking at the world. You can find some of my work here.

Preprints

  • Characterizing the limiting critical Potts measures on locally regular-tree-like expander graphs, with Hang Du. arXiv

TA at Stanford

  • STATS 117 — Introduction to Probability Theory (Summer 2024, Spring 2025)
  • STATS 118 — Probability Theory for Statistical Inference (Winter 2026)
  • STATS 203 — Introduction to Regression Models and Analysis of Variance (Winter 2024)
  • STATS 217 — Introduction to Stochastic Processes I (Summer 2025)
  • STATS 218 — Introduction to Stochastic Processes II (Spring 2024)
  • STATS 310A / MATH 230A — Theory of Probability (Autumn 2024)
